researcher.title: Symbol Researcher
researcher.subtitle: Analyze common Ad SDKs (like BUAdSDK, GDTMobSDK) to accurately locate hook points.
researcher.emptyState: Input class or method name to start analysis

guides.title: Injection Guide

step1.title: Step 1: Decryption
step1.p1: Use DumpDecrypter or Frida-ios-dump to obtain decrypted IPA from a jailbroken device.
step1.p2: Extract the IPA to find the main binary executable name.

step2.title: Step 2: Development & Build
step2.p1: Setup Theos environment and create a tweak template.
step2.p2: Copy the generated .xm code to your project folder.
step2.p3: Run make package to build the .dylib file.

step3.title: Step 3: Injection & Packaging
step3.p1: Use optool or yololib to add the dylib path to Mach-O Load Commands.
step3.p2: Ensure the dylib file is placed in the App directory.
step3.p3: Include dependencies (like CydiaSubstrate) and modify Dylib IDs if necessary.

step4.title: Step 4: Sideload & Test
step4.p1: Use Sideloadly, AltStore, or 3uTools to re-sign and install the IPA.
step4.p2: Open the app and verify if the hook is effective.

githubActions.title: GitHub Actions Automation (CI/CD)
githubActions.p1: Use GitHub's cloud servers for compilation. Create .github/workflows/build.yml.
githubActions.noMacDesc: GitHub virtual environment includes macOS with Theos support.
githubActions.deliveryDesc: Automated Release package creation for download.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Q: Where is the code? How to build?
faq.q1a1: 1. Location: Code appears in the right box. Click copy icon to get Tweak.xm source.
faq.q1a2: 2. GitHub Build: Export project to GitHub, save code as Tweak.xm in root. Makefile and control are included.
faq.q1a3: 3. Download DEB: Download the DEB from Artifacts in GitHub Actions job details.
faq.q2: Q: How to deploy with BT Panel?
faq.q2a1: 1. Click 'Add Project' in BT Docker page.
faq.q2a2: 2. Select project directory, docker-compose.yml will be detected.
faq.q2a3: 3. Add environment variables: GEMINI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY.

guides.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Generated code is for research only. Dylib development requires Mach-O knowledge.
